name: Gentle Foaming Cleanser
description: A sulfate-free daily cleanser that removes excess oil without stripping the skin barrier.

name: Cream Hydrating Cleanser
description: Milky, non-foaming cleanser that cleanses gently while nourishing dry and sensitive skin.

name: Hydrating Barrier Repair Cream
description: Rich, fragrance-free moisturizer that restores the skin barrier and locks in moisture for 24 hours.

name: Oil-Control Mattifying Gel
description: Lightweight gel moisturizer that hydrates without shine — ideal for oily and acne-prone skin.

name: Centella Calming Recovery Cream
description: Soothing cream that calms redness and strengthens a compromised skin barrier.

name: 10% Niacinamide Serum
description: Lightweight serum that visibly reduces pore size and controls sebum production.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: Antioxidant-rich morning serum that brightens dull skin and fades dark spots over time.

name: Alpha Arbutin Spot Corrector
description: Targeted brightening serum for dark spots, melasma, and uneven skin tone.

name: Peptide Firming Serum
description: Collagen-boosting serum that firms skin and softens fine lines with daily use.

name: Overnight Retinol Repair
description: Nightly anti-aging treatment that improves texture and reduces fine lines over 8–12 weeks.

name: 2% BHA Pore Refining Toner
description: Exfoliating toner that unclogs pores, reduces blackheads, and refines skin texture.

name: 7% Glycolic Acid Exfoliating Toner
description: AHA toner that smooths rough texture and restores radiance to dull, uneven skin.

name: Tea Tree Blemish Spot Gel
description: Fast-acting spot treatment that targets active breakouts and reduces inflammation overnight.

name: 10% Azelaic Acid Suspension
description: Multi-tasking treatment for rosacea-prone skin — reduces redness, blemishes, and post-acne marks.

name: Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Broad-spectrum, non-greasy mineral sunscreen suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Hydrating Serum
description: A deep hydrating serum that plumps skin, locks in moisture, and eliminates dry skin flaking.

name: Ceramide Barrier Moisture Balm
description: Intense rich moisture balm that prevents transepidermal water loss and heals extra dry skin.

name: Squalane Nourishing Face Oil
description: 100% plant-derived squalane nourishing oil that deeply hydrates dry skin for a radiant, dewy finish.
